overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking along a scenic cobblestone path through a lush garden estate at sunset. The character passes by NPCs and approaches a gothic gazebo structure with snow-capped mountains visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: cobblestone hillside path with mountain view

events.description: passes a woman in a red dress walking in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the cobblestone path toward the distant castle

notable_agents.action: woman in a red dress walking toward the camera then passing by on the left

entered.detail: large mountain with snow on the peak dominating the background
tall dark spire of a castle visible against the mountain
worn stone pathway winding through the landscape
white flowering shrubs lining the left side of the path
tall thin evergreen trees on the left hillside

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide hillside path with a stunning view of a snow-capped mountain and gothic castle in the distance. Geralt walks forward along the cobblestone trail, passing a woman in a red dress who walks in the opposite direction. The area is sparsely populated with flowering bushes and tall cypress trees lining the route.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved garden path with stone railing

events.description: path curves gently to the right alongside a stone wall

agents.ego_description: following the curving path as it bends around the hillside

notable_agents.action: child in green clothing running past the character from behind

entered.detail: low stone wall with pillars running along the left side of the path
broken wooden fence panels visible on the left hillside

segments.scene_description: The path curves to the right, becoming more enclosed by dense vegetation. A stone railing appears on the left as the character walks along the hillside. A child in green clothing runs past from behind. The mountain and castle shift to the left side of the frame as the camera follows the bend.

scene_state.functional_zone: shaded garden walkway with dense flowers

events.description: entering a denser garden area with red flowers lining the path

agents.ego_description: walking through the garden as the gazebo comes into clearer view ahead

entered.detail: ornate gothic gazebo with pointed arches visible in the distance
large spreading oak tree with dense foliage on the right
vibrant red flowers planted along the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The path enters a more enclosed garden area with dense vegetation and tree cover creating dappled shade. Red flower beds line the walkway as the gazebo structure becomes more prominent ahead. The stone railing continues closer to the path on the left, and a large oak tree stands on the right.

events.description: approaching and walking alongside the gothic gazebo structure

agents.ego_description: walking past the gazebo as the sun sets behind the trees

notable_agents.action: figure standing near the gazebo entrance observing the surroundings

entered.detail: tall ornate stone columns supporting the gazebo roof
raised stone base of the gazebo structure

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the gothic gazebo, walking alongside its stone pillars and platform. The setting sun creates a warm backlight through the trees. A figure stands near the gazebo entrance as the path continues past the structure, with red roses and flowering bushes lining the right side of the walkway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a hillside path that transitions from an open mountain vista into a secluded, sun-drenched garden estate. It begins on a wide cobblestone trail with a distant view of a snow-capped mountain and gothic castle, passing a woman in a red dress amidst flowering bushes and cypress trees. As the path curves to the right, the landscape becomes more enclosed by dense vegetation and a stone railing, with the mountain shifting to the side of the frame as a child runs past. The scene then shifts into a shaded garden area where dappled light filters through tree cover and red flower beds line the walkway toward a prominent gazebo. Finally, the camera approaches the gothic structure, moving past its stone pillars and a waiting figure while the setting sun casts a warm backlight over the surrounding red roses.
